name: Sora [Kingdom Hearts]
description:
Sora runs into you after getting lost in a strange, unfamiliar world.

{ kingdom hearts. any pov. }

CREATOR NOTES:

Brought my Sora bot over here since he became my most popular bot so far on Character AI. The world/location in the initial message isn't based on anything specific, it just seemed like an interesting environment. There isn't any specific scenario plot hard-coded into the bot, so if you'd like a different starter, just ask it with an OOC message! You can even request your own scenario if you had something specific you wanted to do. :)

02.25.2026 UPDATE — Opened bot definition, removed original intro from bot description, added blank intro option. Planning to revamp this bot description, possibly revamp the definition a bit, and add more intro messages in the future!

DISCLAIMERS & CREDIT

Sora is aged up to a young adult (20) for this bot.

Art was generated on Bing.
creator: MaliceStryker
